objective: Support the April 8 trust carousel with a short premium-trust hook, a simple reading lens, and a clear route back to the feed
visual_engine: image-led opener + structured editorial support frames
source_lane: Nano-Banana-source-image for frame 1 opener plate + design-first-no-image for frames 2 and 3
source_strategy: reuse the approved April 8 Nano Banana trust plate for the opener so the story stays visually tied to the feed, then assemble frames 2 and 3 in the compositor
fallback_source: fallback to a text-led opener only if the image-backed opener fails readability or text-safe-zone review
visual_intent: warmer opener tied to the feed cover
clear route back to the feed
brand_guardrails: preserve top and bottom safe zones
keep the story lighter than the feed carousel
avoid internal labels, Set names, or template residue
do not add fake sticker UI
frame 3 should route back to the feed, not become another lesson
protect the opener text zone against the image focal area
composition: frame 1 uses the approved April 8 trust plate with protected upper-left copy space
frame 2 translates trust into three simple daily reading cues
frame 3 routes back to the feed with one clear support card

text_overlay.headline_ja:
上質さって、
見た目だけでは
決まりません。
slides_ja:
上質さって、
見た目だけでは
決まりません。

本当に上質と
感じるのは、
どんなとき？

今日の投稿で
信頼の見方を
整理しています。

notes: This is a support Story for the April 8 trust carousel. Keep it lighter than the feed and use the approved cover plate only as a family opener, not as a duplicate cover.
